title: User-defined data types
summary: 9618 A Level — ENUM, SET, RECORD, and POINTER types in pseudocode.
learningObjectives: Declare records with mixed field types.

simpleExplanation.title: Custom types
simpleExplanation.summary: ENUM restricts values to a list. SET handles unordered collections. Pointers reference memory locations for linked structures.
steps: SET OF CHAR for character sets.

sections.content: **User-defined types** (13.1) support **ADTs** and **linked lists** at A Level. Match type to **data structure** in the question.
